build_method: local-first (LM Studio + retriever + validator); EXPECT heavy Claude top-up — thinnest public-voice domain so far; lean on cross-lists.
notes: Merged Risk + Compliance. Ultra-think restructured cells toward where citable PUBLIC voices exist (privacy, AI-accountability, reg-policy, security-via-crosslist) and dropped the thin standalone audit/regtech cell (audit folded into erm-grc-leadership). 30 native + ~12 cross-listed.

cells.privacy-data-protection: Privacy law, data protection, GDPR/CCPA, privacy-by-design.
cells.ai-governance-responsible-ai: AI governance, responsible AI, algorithmic accountability, EU AI Act / NIST RMF.
cells.regulatory-tech-policy: Tech regulation, antitrust, platform policy, algorithmic-accountability journalism/law.
cells.security-governance: Security governance, disclosure, threat policy (cross-listed from Engineering).
cells.erm-grc-leadership: Enterprise risk management, GRC frameworks, internal audit, three-lines model.
cells.model-systemic-risk: Model risk, validation (SR 11-7), systemic/financial-stability risk (cross-listed from Trading).

personas.name: Daniel Solove

personas.anchor: Cornell Tech; contextual integrity — the dominant theory of privacy-in-context
